LanguageData.FB_BileMortarGland.label: bile mortar gland
LanguageData.FB_BileMortarGland.description: A living artillery gland that grows bileburst podlings and launches mature ones as incendiary shells.
LanguageData.FB_BileMortarGlandEmbryo.label: bile mortar gland embryo
LanguageData.FB_BileMortarGlandEmbryo.description: An immature bile organ that will grow into a bile mortar gland.
LanguageData.FB_BileburstPodling.label: bileburst podling
LanguageData.FB_BileburstPodling.description: A living bile charge grown by the mortar gland. It matures over time, then detonates itself or loads into a bile mortar.
LanguageData.FB_BileburstPodling.tools.0.label: soft bite
LanguageData.FB_BileburstPodlingShell.label: bileburst podling shell
LanguageData.FB_BileburstPodlingShell.description: A bileburst podling folded into an artillery arc, ready to rupture into burning organic bile on impact.
LanguageData.FB_VolatileBileFilth.label: volatile bile
LanguageData.FB_VolatileBileFilth.description: A slick smear of unstable organic bile. It burns readily when exposed to flame.
